method: Midpoint of IEA's 3-5 mb/d early-2026 spare East-West range; capped below the 5 mb/d export portion of the 7 mb/d system.
IEA estimate of incremental room in ADCOP above roughly 1.1 mb/d already routed to Fujairah.
Rounded near-term northern export capacity via Turkiye; southern Basra exports have no operational connection to it.
